untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'retracement' (a multi-bar price pattern) and 'support confirmation' which cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. The exact magnitude of retracement and confirmation method are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred from available indicators.
translation_notes: Translated core logic: price at or above previous close (support hold) while previous close above pivot. Exit when price closes below previous close (support break). However, the retracement magnitude and support confirmation criteria are author-silent and require subjective multi-bar pattern recognition not available in the indicator set.
